criteria.evidence: Names `prepareRow(Row $row)` in `AcmePaymentTransaction.php` and describes the switch in that method handling per-gateway payload normalization.
Names class `AcmePaymentTransaction` in `/acme_migrate/src/Plugin/migrate/source/AcmePaymentTransaction.php` as the migration source.
Describes `case 'stripe'` as PHP-serialized payload using `unserialize(..., ['allowed_classes' => FALSE])`, extracting `paymentRef` and `payMethod`.
Describes `case 'paypal'` parsing a pipe/delimited-style string via `explode('. ')` and `explode(' : ')`, with key/value normalization and filtering.
Identifies `acceptance_date` and `paypal_clearing_date` conversion using `DrupalDateTime` to Unix timestamps, also setting remote date source properties.
